scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@agenc/sdk && npm run build --workspace=@agenc/runtime && npm run build --workspace=@agenc/mcp && npm run build --workspace=@agenc/docs-mcp
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=@agenc/sdk && npm run test --workspace=@agenc/runtime
scripts.test:fast: npx ts-mocha -p ./tsconfig.json -t 300000 tests/test-create-task.ts tests/test-claim-task.ts tests/test-lifecycle.ts tests/test-state-machine.ts tests/test-authority.ts tests/test-audit-gaps.ts tests/test-escrow.ts tests/test-disputes.ts tests/test-reputation-stake.ts tests/test-concurrency.ts tests/test-invariants.ts tests/test-reputation-gate.ts tests/agent-feed.ts
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@agenc/sdk && npm run typecheck --workspace=@agenc/runtime && npm run typecheck --workspace=@agenc/mcp
